title: Merge PR and return to base branch
description:
## Objective
Merge the iteration 2.1 PR with --merge (NOT squash, NOT rebase) and return to the base branch s2-win-probability.

## Implementation
1. `gh pr merge --merge` (only after CI is green).
2. `git checkout s2-win-probability && git pull`.
3. `git log -1` — confirm the merge commit landed.

## Tests
Merge commit on s2-win-probability; feature branch optionally deleted.
acceptance_criteria: PR merged via --merge, local s2-win-probability up to date
